title: krascheninnikovia lanata var. ruinina
intro: Krascheninnikovia lanata var. ruinina, also known as Russian thistle or Salsola ruthenica, is a plant species in the Amaranthaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Krascheninnikovia lanata var. ruinina can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
